title: Triple-A puts multicurrency account on stablecoin rails
message_html: Triple-A puts multicurrency account on stablecoin rails ...
snippet: Today, Triple-A, a licensed global payment institution, announces the launch of the European rollout of stablecoin-enabled Multicurrency Accounts, giving global businesses access to local banking collection rails without the need to set up a local entity.

title: Mastercard to add stablecoin, intraday and non-business day settlement options
message_html: Mastercard to add stablecoin, intraday and non-business day settlement options ...
snippet: Mastercard to add stablecoin, intraday and non-business day settlement options Electronic Payments International
